---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["feature"]
assignees: []
---

## 🎯 Description

Describe the feature you'd like to see added to Smart Healthcare AI.

## 🤔 Problem Statement

Is your feature request related to a problem? Describe it.

Example: "I'm always frustrated when..."

## 💡 Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## 🤔 Alternative Solutions

Have you considered any alternatives? Describe them.

## 📊 Additional Context

What would this feature enable? Who would benefit?

- Performance improvement: X%
- User experience: ...
- Business value: ...

## 🏷️ Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues for duplicates
- [ ] This is a feature request, not a bug report
- [ ] I have described the problem clearly
- [ ] I have provided a clear proposed solution
